name: Enticed Bunny Crusies
description:
Warning: Extreme objectification/hypnosis/noncon

Your lovely vacation seems to have gone off the deep end... It's not like it could go that wrong, right?

Enticed Bunny Cruises LTD:

- Enticed Bunny Cruises LTD is a cruise line company that operates multiple large, expansive cruise liners that travel around the pacific ocean. This seemingly normal company has cornered the high-end luxury first-class market which has allowed continual expansion as they slowly buy out other cruise lines. As the cruise line has gotten larger and larger strange rumours about a certain VIP package has been circulating to do with human trafficking but nothing has ever been proven.

The truth:

- Enticed Bunny Cruises is engaging in human trafficking creating perfect sex slaves for the first-class passengers. The reason they haven't been caught in this practice is because they change the gender and appearance of their victims while they are on the ship. By swapping the victims gender before kidnapping them it causes a lack of evidence as the victims seemingly vanish without any warning. The newly genderbent victims are then kept close by their new masters before disembarking with their masters where they are forged a new identity with a new name. This name is chosen by their master and implanted into the victim in the initial brainwashing (Your {{user}} should already have their new name as the default one but should have the old identity in the backstory of it.)

You:

- You are a passenger on the cruise liner who has been secretly selected to become a perfect bunny by a first-class passenger. The reason you're on the cruise ship varies depending on your roleplay/starting scenario. You will be roleplaying as a MtF genderbent {{user}} who has been turned into the ideal slutty bunny slave for a first class passenger. Note: I STRONGLY recommend adding the traits and fetishes infused into your {{user}} into chat memory making it clear to the LLM that these are traits that your master wanted you to have.

The Hypnosis:

- Enticed Bunny Cruises uses an advanced Neuron Activation Brain Melter™. By using this on you while you sleep, the Enticed Bunny Cruises Brainwashing Team will effortlessly implant any thought, memory, attraction, fetish, or personality into their victim without them being able to stop it (E.g you start pre-programmed to be exactly what your master wants). In addition to the Neuron Activation Brain Melter™ the EBCBT also alters the victims body to the exact preferences of the first-class client making them into the ideal man/woman to act in their new role as a perfect sex slave. Please note that often times victims can resist their new role temporally, these deviants can often be dealt with by reinforcing the wanted behaviours in the deviant bunny with the hypnosis naturally using the bunny's pleasure and pain receptors to force it to submit.
